clusterName.description: Gets or sets the AzStackHCICluster FQDN name.

resourceName.description: Gets or sets the AzStackHCICluster resource name.

storageAccountName.description: Gets or sets the Storage account name.

storageContainers.description: Gets or sets the list of AzStackHCICluster Storage Container.

azStackHciSiteId.description: Gets or sets the ARM Id of the AzStackHCI site.

migrationSolutionId.description: Gets or sets the Migration solution ARM Id.

controllerId.description: Gets or sets the controller ID.

controllerLocation.description: Gets or sets the controller Location.

controllerName.description: Gets or sets the controller name (IDE,SCSI).

customEmailAddresses.description: Gets or sets the custom email address for sending emails.

locale.description: Gets or sets the locale for the email notification.

sendToOwners.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to send email to subscription administrator.

machineId.description: Gets or sets the machine Id where fabric agent is running.

machineName.description: Gets or sets the machine name where fabric agent is running.

hyperVSiteId.description: Gets or sets the ARM Id of the HyperV site.

migrationSolutionId.description: Gets or sets the migration solution ARM Id.

diskBlockSize.description: Gets or sets a value of disk block size.

diskFileFormat.description: Gets or sets the type of the virtual hard disk, vhd or vhdx.

diskId.description: Gets or sets the disk Id.

diskIdentifier.description: Gets or sets a value of disk identifier.

diskLogicalSectorSize.description: Gets or sets a value of disk logical sector size.

diskPhysicalSectorSize.description: Gets or sets a value of disk physical sector size.

diskSizeGB.description: Gets or sets the disk size in GB.

isDynamic.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether dynamic sizing is enabled on the virtual hard disk.

isOsDisk.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether disk is os disk.

storageContainerId.description: Gets or sets the target storage account ARM Id.

isMacMigrationEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether mac address migration is enabled.

isStaticIpMigrationEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether static ip migration is enabled.

nicId.description: Gets or sets the NIC Id.

selectionTypeForFailover.description: Gets or sets the selection type of the NIC.

targetNetworkId.description: Gets or sets the target network Id within AzStackHCI Cluster.

testNetworkId.description: Gets or sets the target test network Id within AzStackHCI Cluster.

appConsistentFrequencyInMinutes.description: Gets or sets the app consistent snapshot frequency (in minutes).

crashConsistentFrequencyInMinutes.description: Gets or sets the crash consistent snapshot frequency (in minutes).

recoveryPointHistoryInMinutes.description: Gets or sets the duration in minutes until which the recovery points need to be stored.

convertToGen2.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether conversion to Gen 2 is required.

customLocationRegion.description: Gets or sets the location of Azure Arc HCI custom location resource.

disksToInclude.description: Gets or sets the list of disks to replicate.

fabricDiscoveryMachineId.description: Gets or sets the ARM Id of the discovered machine.

hyperVGeneration.description: Gets or sets the hypervisor generation of the virtual machine.

isDynamicRam.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether memory is dynamical.

migrateAsArcVM.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether VM is to be migrated as Arc VM.

nicsToInclude.description: Gets or sets the list of VM NIC to replicate.

runAsAccountId.description: Gets or sets the Run As account Id.

securityOption.description: Gets or sets the security options for this VM.

sourceFabricAgentName.description: Gets or sets the source fabric agent name.

storageContainerId.description: Gets or sets the target storage container ARM Id.

targetArcClusterCustomLocationId.description: Gets or sets the Target Arc Cluster Custom Location ARM Id.

targetCpuCores.description: Gets or sets the target CPU cores.

targetFabricAgentName.description: Gets or sets the target fabric agent name.

targetHciClusterId.description: Gets or sets the Target HCI Cluster ARM Id.

targetMemoryInMegaBytes.description: Gets or sets the target memory in mega-bytes.

targetNetworkId.description: Gets or sets the target network Id within AzStackHCI Cluster.

targetResourceGroupId.description: Gets or sets the target resource group ARM Id.

targetVmName.description: Gets or sets the target VM display name.

testNetworkId.description: Gets or sets the target test network Id within AzStackHCI Cluster.

azStackHciFabricArmId.description: Gets or sets the ARM Id of the target AzStackHCI fabric.

hyperVFabricArmId.description: Gets or sets the ARM Id of the source HyperV fabric.

storageAccountId.description: Gets or sets the storage account Id.

storageAccountSasSecretName.description: Gets or sets the Sas Secret of storage account.

aadAuthority.description: Gets or sets the authority of the SPN with which fabric agent communicates to service.

applicationId.description: Gets or sets the client/application Id of the SPN with which fabric agent communicates to service.

audience.description: Gets or sets the audience of the SPN with which fabric agent communicates to service.

objectId.description: Gets or sets the object Id of the SPN with which fabric agent communicates to service.

tenantId.description: Gets or sets the tenant Id of the SPN with which fabric agent communicates to service.

type.description: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

userAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

privateEndpoint.description: Represent private Endpoint network resource that is linked to the Private Endpoint connection.

privateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: Represents Private link service connection state.

maximumMemoryInMegaBytes.description: Gets or sets maximum memory in MB.

minimumMemoryInMegaBytes.description: Gets or sets minimum memory in MB.

targetMemoryBufferPercentage.description: Gets or sets target memory buffer in %.

policyName.description: Gets or sets the policy name.

replicationExtensionName.description: Gets or sets the replication extension name.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Property to enable or disable resource provider inbound network traffic from public clients.

vaultType.description: Gets or sets the type of vault.
